metadata.description: z0rd0n88's Claude Code mods — plugins, skills, and tooling.

plugins.name: idea-autopsy
plugins.description: Three-skill idea-review loop: stress-test holes, iterate to v2, then deliver an invest/skip verdict.

plugins.name: inventory
plugins.description: Generate .CLAUDE.inventory.md — a per-project audit of every Claude Code automation, tagged installed vs custom.

plugins.name: total-review
plugins.description: Parallel multi-agent code review pattern. Fans specialised reviewers along clean layer boundaries with exclusion-list dedup against the issue tracker.

plugins.name: multi-agent-review
plugins.description: Parallel multi-agent review with synthesizer dedup + cross-axis severity budget. Targets PR/dir/file/spec/diff/slices. Ships a review→fix→re-review loop wrapper too.

plugins.name: i-cant-even
plugins.description: Design-decision advisor. Orients on the codebase, grills you, runs a 4-persona panel, delivers a one-screen recommendation memo.

plugins.name: multi-agent-developer
plugins.description: Manager-led TDD dev team (≤4 Opus agents) that debates a spec across RED→GREEN→REFACTOR rounds, synthesizes via an architect, materializes a worktree, runs tests. Plus a one-time setup skill.
